name: Aurora Glow Theme
description: The default ISHA look — violet-to-amber aurora accents and ambient particles.

name: Midnight Mono
description: A quieter, near-monochrome dark theme for long focus sessions.

name: Sunrise Light
description: A warm light theme for daytime coding.

name: Bracket Pulse
description: Animates a soft pulse around matching brackets as you move the cursor.

name: Zen Particles
description: Adds slow-drifting ambient particles behind the editor while you type.

name: Commit Lens (Git status in sidebar)
description: Shows modified/untracked markers next to files in the explorer.

name: Web Dev Snippet Pack
description: Handy HTML/CSS/JS snippets available via the command palette.
